title: langdetect: no confidence threshold
description: detect_language uses whatlang::detect_lang which discards the confidence score. Short posts (20-50 chars), code snippets, or mixed-language text can get low-confidence false detections (e.g. code detected as Indonesian/Malay due to common variable names). whatlang::detect returns Info with is_reliable() (threshold 0.9). Consider switching to detect() and only accepting results where is_reliable() is true. Without this, users will see wrong language tags on short or code-heavy posts.
